settings.heading: Custom Shields & Plaques in India
settings.subheading: Wooden, metal and acrylic award shields and plaques for felicitations, honour boards, inaugurations and recognition — engraved with names, logos and citations. Custom-made in Bangalore.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy makes award shields and plaques in wood, metal and acrylic from around ₹250 — for felicitations, honour boards, inaugurations and recognition. Engraved with names, logos and citations, delivered pan-India. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: Classic shields and plaques
settings.text: Shields and plaques are the traditional choice for felicitations, foundation-stone and inauguration mementos, honour boards and service recognition. We make them in engraved wood, plated metal and printed acrylic, with your logo, citation and date — single pieces or matched sets for a board of honourees.

settings.title: Wood, metal & acrylic
settings.text: A material and price for every occasion.

settings.title: Engraved citations
settings.text: Full citations, names, logos and dates.

settings.title: Honour boards
settings.text: Matched sets and large boards for institutions.

settings.question: What's the difference between a shield and a plaque?
settings.answer: A shield is typically a mounted crest shape; a plaque is a flat engraved panel. We make both, often with similar engraving and branding.

settings.question: Can you make matched sets for a board of honourees?
settings.answer: Yes — co-ordinated sets with individual names are a speciality for institutions and corporates.

settings.question: Do you make inauguration mementos?
settings.answer: Yes — foundation-stone, ribbon-cutting and opening-ceremony plaques with date and dignitary names.

settings.heading: Need shields & plaques for an event?
settings.text: Tell us the occasion, quantity and date — we'll send designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
